tools.name: zendesk_list_open_tickets
tools.description: Returns a list of currently active open ticket IDs from the support queue.

tools.name: zendesk_get_ticket
tools.description: Fetches a Zendesk customer support ticket by its ID.

tools.name: salesforce_get_customer_context
tools.description: Retrieves account tier, contract value, and account owner from Salesforce.

tools.name: postgres_get_sync_telemetry
tools.description: Queries the operational telemetry database (PostgreSQL) for JVM sync logs.

tools.name: workday_get_oncall_engineer
tools.description: Queries Workday for the current engineering on-call personnel.

tools.name: jira_create_bug_ticket
tools.description: Creates a Jira Bug ticket and returns the generated issue ID.

tools.name: postgres_update_connector_memory
tools.description: Updates JVM heap memory allocation for a connector sync worker.

tools.name: enterprise_trigger_connector_sync
tools.description: Manually forces a sync retry for a database connector worker.

tools.name: zendesk_update_ticket
tools.description: Writes a comment or updates the support status of a Zendesk ticket.
